title: Major Professional Sports Franchise STAR Bond Bill

key_numbers.label: Amount transferred to state gaming revenues fund
Funds already allocated for other purposes
Percentage of STAR bond funding of total project costs

events.description: Memorandum sent to Senator Erickson and Representative Tarwater

evidence.quote: This bill establishes a STAR bond-based economic development initiative for the purpose of attracting up to two major professional sports
The program is structured to provide two pathways for establishment of a project.
If enacted the bill would become effective July 1, 2024.

uncertainties: The determination of base year tax revenues for purposes of setting the tax increment for funding of STAR bonds is discretionary.
recommended_next_queries: What are the current sports teams in Kansas?
What is the budget for this project?
